seoTitle: East Bunbury vs East Cannington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Bunbury and East Cannington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Bunbury vs East Cannington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Bunbury and East Cannington.
heading: East Bunbury vs East Cannington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Bunbury, Western Australia and East Cannington, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Bunbury has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to East Cannington (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Bunbury or East Cannington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Bunbury has a flood risk score of 60/100, while East Cannington scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Bunbury scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. East Cannington scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Bunbury or East Cannington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Bunbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
